required_preferences.fact: Strictly follows doctor-prescribed meal plans for all weekday dinners, including specific cholesterol-lowering recipes and portions — never deviates, even for family requests or special occasions

supersedes.fact: Prepares all weekday dinners at home to maintain low-sodium intake — never eats out Monday through Friday

required_preferences.fact: Schedules biweekly check-ins with junior engineers across both teams, alternating between hands-on automation tasks and written migration assignments to address broader team needs

supersedes.fact: Schedules weekly check-ins with the junior engineer, always pairing them on hands-on automation tasks rather than giving written assignments

required_preferences.fact: Sets slack status to 'Do Not Disturb' during family dinners — won’t respond to work messages
Commutes to the downtown office by car every morning, timing departure to avoid peak traffic; listens to short podcasts during the drive instead of reading news at home
Assists his elderly neighbor with tech issues in person — refuses remote troubleshooting for clarity
Prepares quick kid-friendly lunches and snacks on solo Sundays, prioritizing simple recipes over elaborate meals to balance childcare and chores

persona: A senior DevOps engineer managing cloud infrastructure for a healthcare company
